DEADCELLS-HALF_LIFE_EVENT.title: Half Alive?
You've been making your way through the Spire for a while now. Every so often, you run into all kinds of creatures or... their [red]corpses[/red]: some flashy guy in a magenta belt muttering about whose world this is, a white bug carrying a nail-shaped weapon longer than itself, even a chicken with a basketball!
[green]"This place is crazy!"[/green]
You think to yourself as you pass another [red]corpse[/red].
[green]"You, at least... look like a pretty normal dead body."[/green]
Then suddenly, you think you see his body [sine]twitch[/sine], and the crate beneath him gives a dull thud.
Corpse came back to life. Run!
DEADCELLS-HALF_LIFE_EVENT.pages.CHOOSE_N:
You lean in for a closer look at the "man." He's sprawled across a few wooden crates, and by the look of it, he's long dead.
[green]"Weird..."[/green]
Just as that thought crosses your mind, you notice a [gold][sine]yellow four-legged bug[/sine][/gold] clinging to his head. Its legs are wrapped tightly around the skull, and the only sign it's still alive is a faint [red][sine]twitch[/sine][/red].
[green]"It's still alive... like it's only got half a life left."[/green]
Then you spot a [blue]Crowbar[/blue] wedged between the crates, and a few [blue]Grenades[/blue] still hanging from the corpse.
[green]Remove[/green] all [gold]Strike[/gold] cards. Gain the same number of [gold]Crowbar[/gold] cards.
DEADCELLS-HALF_LIFE_EVENT.pages.LEAVE_CH: You think it over, then decide to leave...
You take the [blue]Crowbar[/blue] and hurry off before the bug notices you.
You take the [blue]Grenades[/blue] and hurry off before the bug notices you.

You look at the two weapons in your hands and turn to leave. But the [sine]bug[/sine] perched on the [red]corpse[/red] seems to have noticed you. Only now do you get a good look at it: beneath it is a [red]bloody, gaping mouth[/red].
Startled, you stumble backward and land hard on the ground. The bug lunges straight for your head!
...
By the time you come to, it's already gone.
[green]"Oh, right. I forgot I don't have a head..."[/green]
You pat yourself down and find that you're only missing some [gold]Gold[/gold].
DEADCELLS-DARK_SOUL_EVENT.title: A Strange Pattern
You find a strange entrance in the Spire. It's blocked by rubble, and a [gold]strange rune pattern[/gold] can still be seen faintly on the ground.
I feel like I've seen this pattern somewhere before...
DEADCELLS-DARK_SOUL_EVENT.pages.CHOOSE_N: Memories come flooding back. The pattern on the ground slowly overlaps with the one in your memory—you remember now. You need the [gold]Ram Rune[/gold] to open it. Want to go down and take a look?
DEADCELLS-DARK_SOUL_EVENT.pages.CHOOSE_W: Memories come flooding back. The pattern on the ground slowly overlaps with the one in your memory—you remember now. You need the [gold]Ram Rune[/gold] to open it. Want to go down and take a look?
Smash it open and head inside.
What if there's something dangerous down there? Better bail.
DEADCELLS-DARK_SOUL_EVENT.pages.CHOOSE_B:
The [gold]Ram Rune[/gold] on you begins to glow. You leap up and slam down with all your might.
With a thunderous crash, the pattern and the rubble collapse together, and you fall with them.
When your feet hit solid ground again, dust is swirling all around you. Ahead lies a pitch-black passage, with a faint flickering light at the far end.
Might as well go in now that you're here.
DEADCELLS-DARK_SOUL_EVENT.pages.CHOOSE_G:
At the end of the passage is a room. In the center burns a roaring [gold]bonfire[/gold], with a sword thrust into it; in the corner lies a skeleton in armor, slumped over like it's been dead for ages.
No idea what that bonfire is burning, but somehow it still hasn't gone out.
Seems safe for now. Better have a look around.
See if there's anything useful. ([gold]Gain Gold[/gold] and [gold]Cards[/gold])
DEADCELLS-DARK_SOUL_EVENT.pages.CHOOSE_S:
You walk over to the [gold]bonfire[/gold] and notice a crooked line of words carved into the wall.
You step closer and read:
[red][sine] G I T   G U D [/sine][/red]
[green]"Feels like some kind of incantation. 👍"[/green]

[green]"A short rest couldn't hurt."[/green]
You think to yourself.
It feels as if something is drawing you toward the [gold]bonfire[/gold]. Almost by instinct, you sit down beside it—as if you've done this countless times before.
But not long after, [red]the whole room suddenly begins to shake[/red], then just as quickly falls still again.
[green]"Huh. Something seems to have changed."[/green]
DEADCELLS-DARK_SOUL_EVENT.pages.CHOOSE_F:
You lower your head and examine the skeleton.
[green]"A guy in armor. Been dead a long time."[/green]
You rummage around the body for a while, and sure enough, you come up with some [green]good stuff[/green].
DEADCELLS-DARK_SOUL_EVENT.pages.CHOOSE_B:
When you come to, you're already in another room. All around you are some [red]bugs (BUGs)[/red], flickering in and out for no discernible reason.
You stare at them for a few seconds and begin to wonder whether something's wrong with this place... or with you.
I'm reporting this to the mod author right now!
DEADCELLS-DARK_SOUL_EVENT.pages.LEAVE_CH: You think it over, then decide to leave...
